title: Entry-Level Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at LV Prasad Eye Institute
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
